# Extração: 02-Copy of Mastermind.com Prompt Sequence

- **Fonte:** 02-Copy of Mastermind.com Prompt Sequence.docx
- **Tipo:** DOCX
- **Tamanho:** 10.2 KB

Training GG On Your Business & Offer

Prompt 1:

I’m going to tell you about my business. I want you to provide a brief summary of the information I give you regarding my ideal client, my offer, my high level outcome, the details of my program, as well as some lead magnet outlines. I want you to take everything that you know about my business and summarize my business back to me. We’re going to use this information provided as well as all of your knowledge of my business and industry to create powerful prompt responses in the this chat moving forward:Paste in BRIEF summaries of your ideal client, offer + high level outcome, program, and lead magnet outlines)





Prompt 2:

Knowing everything that you know about my business and the product that I’m offering to my prospects, tell me all you know about my ideal customer and how they make buying decisions. Tell me specifically about why they would choose to consume my product above other products and why my product is better than my competitors. I want you to list out other similar products and services that could be competitive to my product and identify how I could more clearly communicate the unique selling proposition of my product or service over my competitors.



Prompt 3:

With this understanding identify some of the weaknesses that my business has regarding my ideal customers in the marketplace and explain how I can overcome those weaknesses with new products and marketing strategies and tactics.



Prompt 4:

Now that we understand this. I want you to create a framework that specifically addresses all of the above weaknesses. I want you to come up with ways that my business and product(s) is (are) better than my competition, as well as all of the potential weaknesses that my product currently has, and create robust and comprehensive brand messaging that we can use for my business to go to market with for each takeaway.



Video Ad Script and Ad Copy Prompting

Prompt 5:

Great. With this in mind, please create social media ads for each product differentiation bullet point above that we can run to acquire customers for my business online. I want the ads to be created to create massive conversions. Take everything you know about human purchase psychology, the weaknesses of my product and service and other competitors in the marketplace and position my products and services to uniquely fill those gaps. The ads should have a strong and clear CTA to learn more to encourage new customers, warm traffic to take the next step in becoming a customer.



Prompt 6:

Now I want to create UGC video ad scripts for each of the above ads. The framework of each ad needs to consist of:

- A compelling hook or intro that is engaging and will stick out from the user's social feed

- An engaging story or education section that explains the unique product features and benefits as it relates to each ad topic

- A persuasive CTA that encourages the user to take action and purchase our product.



Prompt 7:

For each of these ads, provide corresponding ad copy that will be added to the ad and can be read by the user. I want the ad copy to be persuasive and written to support and provide further context for each of the UGC video ads.



Prompt 8:

The copy needs to be expanded and provide more context for the user. I want you to take all of the creative faculties you can muster to write the best ad copy for each ad that you are capable of writing. Of course writing each ad with the knowledge you have of the industry and the needs, pains, wants, and desires of the target market as it relates to each of the UGC ad topics. You have no creative limitations as you write and create this ad copy.



Crafting High-Converting Sales Copy For Your Landing Page

Prompt 9:

This copy is excellent. I want you to take all of this copy and all of these ad variations and combine them to create sales copy for a landing page that is going to create consistent and scalable conversions. When creating this landing page, I want you to summon all of the information and knowledge that you have regarding the best performing product funnels and CRO best practices. I want you to provide headlines, subheadlines, and sales copy for the entire page as well as page layout and design instructions. The goal of the page is to get a person to (insert your landing page goal and describe what the purpose of the landing page is. Ie, booking a call, downloading my lead magnet, purchasing a tripwire product, signing up for my program, etc.)

Prompt 10:

Great. Now that we have an outline, could you meticulously develop in-depth, persuasive landing page sales copy emphasizing the distinctive features, advantages, and unique selling propositions of our business? Please incorporate key industry jargon, substantiated data points, testimonials, and relevant case studies to substantiate our claims. 



Additionally, it's crucial to highlight the specific value proposition that differentiates it from the competitive landscape. Lastly, underscore why our product or service is an indispensable solution for our target audience addressing their pain points and needs directly and demonstrating how it exceeds their expectations, and illustrating how it aligns with their lifestyle or business objectives. I want you to create all of this landing page sales copy for each section provided in the outline above as if you’re the world’s highest paid and most influential copywriter. Summon everything you know about direct response marketing and copywriting to execute this task.

Prompt 11:

This is great, will you now create a descriptive VSL script that we can put above the fold on the page and will help provide more context to our traffic and encourage purchases based on the information and the context of the rest of the page.



Crafting Engaging Viral Hook Variations For Your Ads

Prompt 12:

Now  take everything you know about this brand and the assets that we’ve created to customize viral hook outlines for this brand and product that we’re selling based on the hooks provided below. I want the hooks to be as engaging as possible.

1. Imagine if you could (insert result here)

Example: Picture yourself making an extra $5k monthly from passive income.

2. Here’s (amount) underestimated (hack/tip/trick)

Example: Here’s 5 overlooked strategies for accelerating your reading speed.

3. Imagine if you could (insert result here)

Example: Imagine if you could double your income by working remotely.

4. This is why your (action) isn’t working

Example: This is why your email marketing isn't converting leads.

5. Here are 3 signs you should (action)

Example: Here are 3 signs you should start investing in stocks.

6. Why doesn’t anyone talk about this?

Example: Why doesn’t anyone talk about this? Organic growth is outpacing paid ads.

7. This one mistake could be costing you ($)

Example: This one oversight could be costing you thousands, you're not utilizing LinkedIn effectively.

8. Exposing my secret to (blank)

Example: Revealing my method for generating a week's content in just a few hours.

9. How to (solution) in (time frame)

Example: How to build a profitable blog in under 4 months.

10. Here are 3 quick ways to get (solution)

Example: Here are 3 fast methods to boost your website traffic.

11. (blank) things that feel illegal to know

Example: 5 marketing strategies that feel too good to be legal.

12. Do you still believe this (industry) myth?

Example: Do you still think email is outdated in digital marketing?

13. This hack will save you hours on (insert solution here)

Example: This trick will shave hours off your social media planning.

14. This is my most controversial belief about (insert topic here)

Example: My most provocative opinion on remote work's impact on productivity.

15. Is it just me, or…

Example: Is it just me, or are podcasts overtaking traditional media?
